title: From freefall to framework: The RBI’s bold bet on reviving PPIs
description: Not long ago, industry payments data painted a grim picture - the prepaid payment instrument (PPI) industry was in freefall, with mobile wallets haemorrhaging users, transaction volumes cratering, and an industry desperately in need of a regulatory lifeline. The Reserve Bank of India (RBI), it seems, was listening.The RBI has now released draft Master Directions on PPIs, 2026 (Draft Directions), inviting public comments. The goal it states, is to have ‘a conducive framework for long term growth
